# Open Bankruptcy Project -- Empirical Research &amp; Free Tools for Bankruptcy Court Transparency
> Free bankruptcy tools and 4.9M-case research database from a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. Discharge screeners, court data, and reform advocacy.

## About
openbankruptcyproject.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- National Bankruptcy Statistics (2008-2024) -- 4.9 Million Cases Analyzed | Open Bankruptcy Project: https://openbankruptcyproject.org/statistics.html
- 11 U.S.C. Section 707 -- Dismissal of Chapter 7 Case: https://openbankruptcyproject.org/707-dismissal.html
- 11 U.S.C. Section 707(b) -- Means Test and Abuse: https://openbankruptcyproject.org/707b-means-test-abuse.html

- About -- Open Bankruptcy Project: https://openbankruptcyproject.org/about.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
